title: UPI Intent Payment Instrument
description: Payment instrument for UPI Intent deep link payments. UPI (Unified Payments Interface) is India's real-time payment system operating via NPCI infrastructure. The device operating system determines which UPI apps are available to the buyer via implicit intent resolution — platforms MUST NOT hardcode or filter app choices per NPCI mandate.

available_upi_intent_instrument.title: Available UPI Intent Instrument
available_upi_intent_instrument.description: Declares availability of UPI Intent payment. No app-level constraints apply — NPCI mandates generic implicit intent support.

id.description: Unique identifier for this instrument instance, assigned by the business.

handler_id.description: The id of the payment handler that produced this instrument. Must match a handler id in the checkout response's payment.handlers array.

type.description: Discriminator value identifying this as a UPI Intent instrument.

display_name.description: Human-readable label for display in platform UI. May be localized (e.g., 'Pay via UPI', 'UPI से भुगतान करें').

display_logo.description: HTTPS URL to the UPI logo for display in platform UI.

credential.description: Transaction-specific credential containing the NPCI-compliant intent URI. Populated by the business in the Complete Checkout response. Not present in Create Checkout responses.
